meaning: n.碰撞,坠落,坠毁,撞击声,爆裂声v.碰撞,坠落,坠毁,(指商业公司,政府等)破产,垮台
examples: We're going to crash, aren't we?
He escaped from the crash unhurt.
The crash occurred on a sharp bend.
One shudders to think of the future calamity of an even worse, more epic, flash crash.
Still, it would be several weeks before the implications of the market crash became clear.
